concerns.text: T004 states 'logging support for causal-language checks (FR-007)' but FR-007 requires an automated check that causes pipeline failure on prohibited keywords. 'Logging support' is a semantic weakening of the FR requirement.
T030 places R² > 0.5 justification in 'research.md' but FR-015 specifies 'final report'. This is a location drift that may not satisfy the spec's deliverable requirement.
T027 describes held-out test evaluation with R² and RMSE but does not explicitly verify the SC-003 threshold (R² > 0.5) as a pass/fail criterion in the task description.
T015 implements Slack (1979) temperature normalization (FR-013) but there is no corresponding unit test task to validate the correction formula implementation, dropping an acceptance criterion.

T038 documents Constitution VII vs FR-010 conflict but does not implement the exclusion of Materials Project thermal properties endpoint in the data ingestion tasks (T012/T014), leaving the conflict unresolved in code.
T007 covers SHA-256 checksums for 'raw data files' but Constitution V requires content hashes for ALL artifacts, not just raw data. Derived files (cleaned, descriptors) are not covered.
T022 implements sensitivity analysis (FR-009) but there is no explicit test task to verify the output includes the required p-value sweep results (0.01, 0.05, 0.1) as specified in FR-009.
